title: Company Names Tribunal decision: VillaPlus Corporation Ltd
body: "Application number 1842  Applicant Villa Plus Limited objected to the name used by Villa Plus Corporation Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 3 April 2019, the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company VillaPlus Corporation Ltd is changed to 11369304. "
